info.name: DiceAnimation
info.signature: class DiceAnimation<T : DiceView>(dice: T, val toSide: Int, duration: Int = DEFAULT_ANIMATION_DURATION, speed: Int = DEFAULT_ANIMATION_SPEED, persist: Boolean = true) : SteppedComponentAnimation<T>
info.doc:
A die roll [Animation](tools.aqua.bgw.animation/Animation).

Shuffles through die visuals for given duration and shows toSide in the end. Use the speed parameter to define how many steps the animation should have.

For example:

An animation with duration = 1s and speed = 50 will change the visual 50 times within the duration of one second.

parameters.name: speed
parameters.doc: Count of changes to be performed in duration. Default: [DEFAULT_ANIMATION_SPEED](tools.aqua.bgw.core/DEFAULT_ANIMATION_SPEED).

parameters.name: persist
parameters.doc: Whether the animation will be persisted and changed the componentView's state. If set to false, it will reset on completion. Default: true.

info.doc: Creates a [RandomizeAnimation](tools.aqua.bgw.animation) for the given [GameComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.gamecomponentviews/GameComponentView).

parameters.name: speed
parameters.doc: Count of changes to be performed in duration. Default: [DEFAULT_ANIMATION_SPEED](tools.aqua.bgw.core/DEFAULT_ANIMATION_SPEED).

info.name: RandomizeAnimation
info.signature: class RandomizeAnimation<T : GameComponentView>(gameComponentView: T, val visuals: List<Visual>, val toVisual: Visual, duration: Int = DEFAULT_ANIMATION_DURATION, speed: Int = DEFAULT_ANIMATION_SPEED, persist: Boolean = true) : SteppedComponentAnimation<T>
info.doc:
A randomization [Animation](tools.aqua.bgw.animation/Animation) that shuffles between different [visuals](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin.collections/-list/index.html).

Shuffles through [visuals](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin.collections/-list/index.html) in the given [visuals](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin.collections/-list/index.html) for given duration and shows toVisual in the end. Use the speed parameter to define how many steps the animation should have.

For example:

An animation with duration = 1s and speed = 50 will change the visual 50 times within the duration of one second.

parameters.name: speed
parameters.doc: Count of changes to be performed in duration. Default: [DEFAULT_ANIMATION_SPEED](tools.aqua.bgw.core/DEFAULT_ANIMATION_SPEED).

parameters.name: persist
parameters.doc: Whether the animation will be persisted and changed the componentView's state. If set to false, it will reset on completion. Default: true.

info.name: dropAcceptor
info.doc:
Returns whether this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) is a valid drop target for the dragged component in the given [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) or not.

Implement this function in such a way that it returns true if this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) accepts the drop of the given [DropEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DropEvent)t.draggedComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DropEvent/draggedComponent) or false if a drop is not valid. The [DropEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DropEvent)t.draggedComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DropEvent/draggedComponent) will snap back if the available drop target returns false.

It is advised not to modify the [Scene](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Scene) or its children in this function. A better suited function to modify the [Scene](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Scene) or its children after a drag and drop gesture is [onDragDropped](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/onDragDropped) .

Note: [onDragDropped](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/onDragDropped) only gets invoked if the dropAcceptor returns true for the given [DropEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DropEvent).

info.name: height
info.doc: The [height](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/height) for this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

info.name: inParentPosX
info.doc: Relative horizontal position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in its parent. Is equal to posX if the parent is not self-layouting like [CardStack](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/CardStack), [HexagonGrid](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/HexagonGrid), [LinearLayout](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/LinearLayout) or [GridPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/GridPane).

info.name: inParentPosY

[ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) is the abstract baseclass of all framework components.

It defines important fields and functions that are necessary to visualize inheriting components.

info.name: opacity
info.doc:
Opacity of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

Must be in range 0.0 to 1.0.

0.0 corresponds to 0% opacity, where 1.0 corresponds to 100% opacity.

Note that invisible objects (opacity == 0.0) still remain interactive.

info.name: parent
info.doc:
The [parent](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/parent) of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

null if this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) is not contained in a [GameComponentContainer](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/GameComponentContainer), [LayoutView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/LayoutView), or a [Scene](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Scene).

If the component has been added directly to a [Scene](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Scene), [parent](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/parent) is equal to the scene's [RootComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components/RootComponent).

If the component is contained within a container, [parent](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/parent) is equal to that container.

info.name: posX
info.doc: Horizontal position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

info.name: posY

info.name: removeFromParent
info.doc: Removes this component from its parent.

throws.name: IllegalStateException
throws.doc: If this component is not contained in any container. Use parent field to check.

info.name: reposition
info.doc: Repositions this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) to the specified coordinates.

info.name: resize
info.doc: Resizes this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) to the specified [width](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/resize) and [height](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/resize).

info.name: rotate
info.doc: Rotates this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) by the given number of [degrees](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/rotate).

parameters.name: degrees
parameters.doc: Degrees to add to current rotation. May be negative.

info.name: rotation
info.doc:
Rotation of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in degrees.

Values not in [0,360) get mapped to values in [0,360) by modulo operation with 360.

example conversions: -10 -> 350 -370 -> 350 370 -> 10 730 -> 10

info.name: DynamicComponentView
info.doc: Baseclass for all ComponentViews that can be draggable. Inheriting components can only be added to BoardGameScenes.

parameters.name: posX
parameters.doc: The X coordinate for this [DynamicComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/DynamicComponentView) relative to its container.

parameters.name: posY
parameters.doc: The Y coordinate for this [DynamicComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/DynamicComponentView) relative to its container.

properties.name: actualHeight
properties.doc: The actual height for this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) considering scale.

properties.name: actualPosX
properties.doc: Absolute horizontal position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in the [Scene](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Scene). Does not take panning and zooming of a [CameraPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/CameraPane) into account.

properties.name: actualPosY
properties.doc: Absolute vertical position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in the [Scene](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Scene). Does not take panning and zooming of a [CameraPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/CameraPane) into account.

properties.name: actualWidth
properties.doc: The actual width for this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) considering scale.

properties.name: dropAcceptor
properties.doc: Returns whether this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) is a valid drop target for the dragged component in the given [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) or not.

properties.name: height
properties.doc: The [height](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/height) for this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: inParentPosX
properties.doc: Relative horizontal position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in its parent. Is equal to posX if the parent is not self-layouting like [CardStack](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/CardStack), [HexagonGrid](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/HexagonGrid), [LinearLayout](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/LinearLayout) or [GridPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/GridPane).

properties.name: inParentPosY
properties.doc: Relative vertical position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in its parent. Is equal to posY if the parent is self-layouting like [CardStack](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/CardStack), [HexagonGrid](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/HexagonGrid), [LinearLayout](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/LinearLayout) or [GridPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/GridPane).

properties.name: isDisabled
properties.doc: Controls if user input events cause input functions of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) to get invoked.

properties.name: isDraggable
properties.doc: Controls whether component is draggable or not.

properties.name: isDragged
properties.doc: Reflects whether component is currently dragged or not.

properties.name: isFocusable
properties.doc: Controls whether this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) is focusable or not.

properties.name: isLayoutFromCenter
properties.doc: Field that indicates whether posX and posY denote the center or top left of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView). Only relevant for GridPanes. Cannot be set manually.

properties.name: isVisible
properties.doc: Visibility of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: layoutBounds
properties.doc: Returns a [CoordinatePlain](tools.aqua.bgw.util/CoordinatePlain) containing the component's corner Coordinates and its layout bounds.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: Name field only for debugging purposes. Has no effect on rendering.

properties.name: onDragDropped
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever a drag and drop gesture finishes over this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) and the [dropAcceptor](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/dropAcceptor) returns true for the given [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent).

properties.name: onDragGestureEnded
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever a drag gesture has ended with this rendered [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: onDragGestureEntered
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever the mouse enters this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) while performing a drag gesture.

properties.name: onDragGestureExited
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever the mouse leaves this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) while performing a drag gesture.

properties.name: onDragGestureMoved
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever a mouse movement occurs during a drag gesture with this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: onDragGestureStarted
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever a drag gesture is started with this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: onKeyPressed
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [KeyEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/KeyEvent) whenever a key is pressed while this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) has focus.

properties.name: onKeyReleased
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [KeyEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/KeyEvent) whenever a key is released while this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) has focus.

properties.name: onKeyTyped
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [KeyEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/KeyEvent) whenever a Character is typed while this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) has focus. Gets invoked after [onKeyPressed](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/onKeyPressed).

properties.name: onMouseClicked
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [MouseEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/MouseEvent) whenever the mouse is clicked inside this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView). Gets invoked after [onMousePressed](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/onMousePressed) and [onMouseReleased](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/onMouseReleased).

properties.name: onMouseEntered

properties.name: onMouseExited

properties.name: onMousePressed

properties.name: onMouseReleased
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [MouseEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/MouseEvent) whenever the mouse is released inside this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: onMouseWheel
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [WheelEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/WheelEvent) whenever the mouse wheel is turned while the mouse is inside this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

info.name: StaticComponentView
info.doc:
Baseclass for all ComponentViews that are considered static. Inheriting components can be added to BoardGameScenes and MenuScenes.

Only StaticViews are allowed in MenuScenes.

parameters.name: posX

types.name: ComponentView
types.doc: [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) is the abstract baseclass of all framework components.

types.name: DynamicComponentView
types.doc: Baseclass for all ComponentViews that can be draggable. Inheriting components can only be added to BoardGameScenes.

types.name: LayeredContainer
types.doc: An interface that describes a container which can hold [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) that can be layered.

types.name: RootComponent
types.doc: The root component in the view hierarchy of a Scene.

types.name: StaticComponentView
types.doc: Baseclass for all ComponentViews that are considered static. Inheriting components can be added to BoardGameScenes and MenuScenes.

info.name: Area
info.signature: constructor(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_AREA_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_AREA_HEIGHT, visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY)
info.doc: Creates an [Area](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container).

info.name: Area
info.signature: open class Area<T : GameComponentView>(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_AREA_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_AREA_HEIGHT, visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY) : GameComponentContainer<T> , Iterable<T>
info.doc:
An [Area](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/Area) may be used to visualize a zone containing GameComponentViews.

Visualization:

The [Visual](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/Visual) is used to visualize a background.

The positioning of the contained GameComponentViews is used to place them relative to the top left corner of this [Area](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/Area).

Components that are out of bounds for this [Area](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/Area) will still get rendered.

info.name: CardStack
info.signature: open class CardStack<T : CardView>(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_CARD_STACK_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_CARD_STACK_HEIGHT, alignment: Alignment = Alignment.CENTER, visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY) : GameComponentContainer<T>
info.doc:
A CardStackView may be used to visualize a card stack.

Visualization:

The [Visual](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/Visual) is used to visualize a background.

The positioning of contained CardViews gets ignored and the specified alignment gets used to position them instead.

parameters.doc: Specifies how the contained CardViews should be aligned. Default: [Alignment.CENTER](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Alignment/CENTER)

info.doc:
Adds all GameComponentViews passed as varargs to this [GameComponentContainer](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/GameComponentContainer).

Whenever a [GameComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.gamecomponentviews/GameComponentView) is encountered, that is already contained, an [IllegalArgumentException](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin/-illegal-argument-exception/index.html) is thrown and no further [GameComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.gamecomponentviews/GameComponentView) is added.

throws.name: IllegalArgumentException
throws.doc: If a [GameComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.gamecomponentviews/GameComponentView) is already contained.

info.name: addAll
info.doc:
Adds all GameComponentViews contained in [collection](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/GameComponentContainer/addAll) to this [GameComponentContainer](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/GameComponentContainer).

Whenever an [GameComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.gamecomponentviews/GameComponentView)] is encountered, that is already contained, an [IllegalArgumentException](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin/-illegal-argument-exception/index.html) is thrown and no further [GameComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.gamecomponentviews/GameComponentView) is added.

parameters.name: collection
parameters.doc: Collection containing the GameComponentViews to add.

throws.name: IllegalArgumentException
throws.doc: If [index](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/GameComponentContainer/add) is out of bounds for [components](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/GameComponentContainer/components).

info.name: GameComponentContainer
info.signature: sealed class GameComponentContainer<T : DynamicComponentView> : DynamicComponentView, LayeredContainer<T>
info.doc:
Baseclass for containers that can contain GameComponentViews or its subclasses.

It provides the list to store GameComponentViews and some useful methods to work on said list.

properties.name: actualHeight
properties.doc: The actual height for this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) considering scale.

properties.name: actualPosX
properties.doc: Absolute horizontal position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in the [Scene](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Scene). Does not take panning and zooming of a [CameraPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/CameraPane) into account.

info.signature: constructor(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_LINEAR_LAYOUT_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_LINEAR_LAYOUT_HEIGHT, spacing: Number = DEFAULT_LINEAR_LAYOUT_SPACING, visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY, orientation: Orientation = Orientation.HORIZONTAL, alignment: Alignment = Alignment.TOP_LEFT)

info.signature: constructor(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = 0, height: Number = 0, spacing: Number = 0, visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY, orientation: Orientation = Orientation.HORIZONTAL, verticalAlignment: VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.TOP, horizontalAlignment: HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.LEFT)

info.name: LinearLayout
info.signature: open class LinearLayout<T : GameComponentView>(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_LINEAR_LAYOUT_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_LINEAR_LAYOUT_HEIGHT, spacing: Number = DEFAULT_LINEAR_LAYOUT_SPACING, visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY, orientation: Orientation = Orientation.HORIZONTAL, alignment: Alignment = Alignment.TOP_LEFT) : GameComponentContainer<T> , Iterable<T>
info.doc:
A [LinearLayout](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/LinearLayout) may be used to visualize a zone containing GameComponentViews.

GameComponentViews inside the container get placed according to the specified [Orientation](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/Orientation) and [Alignment](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Alignment). A spacing between components may be specified which may also be negative e.g. components like playing cards should overlap.

Visualization:

The [Visual](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/Visual) is used to visualize a background.

If all components are still within bounds with the user defined spacing, the user defined spacing gets used to space the components. Otherwise, the biggest possible spacing is used so that all components are still withing bounds of the [LinearLayout](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/LinearLayout).

parameters.name: alignment
parameters.doc: specifies how the contained GameComponentViews should be aligned. Default: [Alignment.TOP_LEFT](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Alignment/TOP_LEFT).

parameters.name: alignment

info.name: Satchel
info.signature: constructor(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_SATCHEL_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_SATCHEL_HEIGHT, visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY)
info.doc: Creates a [Satchel](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container).

info.name: Satchel
info.signature: open class Satchel<T : GameComponentView>(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_SATCHEL_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_SATCHEL_HEIGHT, visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY) : GameComponentContainer<T> , Iterable<T>
info.doc:
A [Satchel](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/Satchel) may be used to visualize a pool containing GameComponentViews.

A typical use case for a [Satchel](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/Satchel) may be to visualize a pile of hidden items, where the user should not know what item might be drawn next.

Visualization:

The current [Visual](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/Visual) is used to visualize the area from where the user can start a drag and drop gesture.

How to Use:

Upon adding a [GameComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.gamecomponentviews/GameComponentView) to a [Satchel](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/Satchel) a snapshot of the initial state of the [GameComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.gamecomponentviews/GameComponentView) gets created and stored. Then the [GameComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.gamecomponentviews/GameComponentView) is made draggable, invisible and its size gets fit to the [Satchel](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/Satchel) size.

Any changes made to those properties while a [GameComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.gamecomponentviews/GameComponentView) is contained in the [Satchel](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/Satchel) get ignored, but they override the initial state.

As soon as a component gets removed (e.g. by initiating a drag and drop gesture) the initial state gets restored. The [GameComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.gamecomponentviews/GameComponentView) at the highest index in the components list registers the next drag and drop gesture above this [Satchel](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/Satchel).

info.name: CardView
info.signature: open class CardView(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_CARD_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_CARD_HEIGHT, front: Visual, back: Visual = front) : GameComponentView
info.doc:
A [CardView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.gamecomponentviews/CardView) may be used to visualize a card.

You can inherit from this class if you want to add additional functionality or fields. Inheriting does NOT change how a cardView is visualized by the BGW framework.

Visualization:

The [Visual](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/Visual) at the [currentSide](tools.aqua.bgw.components.gamecomponentviews/CardView/currentSide) value is used to visualize the card. By default, the back side is shown.

parameters.name: front
parameters.doc: Visual to represent the front side of the card.

parameters.name: back
parameters.doc: [Visual](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/Visual) to represent the back side of the card. Default: same [Visual](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/Visual) as front.

constructors.signature: constructor(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_CARD_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_CARD_HEIGHT, front: Visual, back: Visual = front)

parameters.doc: Visual to represent the front side of the card.

parameters.name: back
parameters.doc: [Visual](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/Visual) to represent the back side of the card. Default: same [Visual](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/Visual) as front.

types.name: CardSide
types.doc: [Enum](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin/-enum/index.html) for the card sides FRONT and BACK with their visual indices.

If [currentSide](tools.aqua.bgw.components.gamecomponentviews/DiceView/currentSide) is out of range, a [Visual.EMPTY](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/Visual/Companion/EMPTY) will be shown.

info.name: GameComponentView
info.doc:
Abstract baseclass for game components like CardViews or TokenViews.

This class is used to restrict the type argument of containers.

properties.name: actualHeight
properties.doc: The actual height for this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) considering scale.

properties.name: actualPosX
properties.doc: Absolute horizontal position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in the [Scene](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Scene). Does not take panning and zooming of a [CameraPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/CameraPane) into account.

properties.name: actualPosY
properties.doc: Absolute vertical position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in the [Scene](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Scene). Does not take panning and zooming of a [CameraPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/CameraPane) into account.

properties.name: actualWidth
properties.doc: The actual width for this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) considering scale.

properties.name: dropAcceptor
properties.doc: Returns whether this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) is a valid drop target for the dragged component in the given [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) or not.

properties.name: height
properties.doc: The [height](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/height) for this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: inParentPosX
properties.doc: Relative horizontal position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in its parent. Is equal to posX if the parent is not self-layouting like [CardStack](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/CardStack), [HexagonGrid](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/HexagonGrid), [LinearLayout](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/LinearLayout) or [GridPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/GridPane).

properties.name: inParentPosY
properties.doc: Relative vertical position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in its parent. Is equal to posY if the parent is self-layouting like [CardStack](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/CardStack), [HexagonGrid](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/HexagonGrid), [LinearLayout](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/LinearLayout) or [GridPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/GridPane).

properties.name: isDisabled
properties.doc: Controls if user input events cause input functions of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) to get invoked.

properties.name: isDraggable
properties.doc: Controls whether component is draggable or not.

properties.name: isDragged
properties.doc: Reflects whether component is currently dragged or not.

properties.name: isFocusable
properties.doc: Controls whether this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) is focusable or not.

properties.name: isLayoutFromCenter
properties.doc: Field that indicates whether posX and posY denote the center or top left of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView). Only relevant for GridPanes. Cannot be set manually.

properties.name: isVisible
properties.doc: Visibility of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: layoutBounds
properties.doc: Returns a [CoordinatePlain](tools.aqua.bgw.util/CoordinatePlain) containing the component's corner Coordinates and its layout bounds.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: Name field only for debugging purposes. Has no effect on rendering.

properties.name: onDragDropped
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever a drag and drop gesture finishes over this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) and the [dropAcceptor](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/dropAcceptor) returns true for the given [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent).

properties.name: onDragGestureEnded
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever a drag gesture has ended with this rendered [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: onDragGestureEntered
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever the mouse enters this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) while performing a drag gesture.

properties.name: onDragGestureExited
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever the mouse leaves this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) while performing a drag gesture.

properties.name: onDragGestureMoved
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever a mouse movement occurs during a drag gesture with this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: onDragGestureStarted
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever a drag gesture is started with this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: onKeyPressed
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [KeyEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/KeyEvent) whenever a key is pressed while this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) has focus.

properties.name: onKeyReleased
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [KeyEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/KeyEvent) whenever a key is released while this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) has focus.

properties.name: onKeyTyped
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [KeyEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/KeyEvent) whenever a Character is typed while this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) has focus. Gets invoked after [onKeyPressed](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/onKeyPressed).

properties.name: onMouseClicked
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [MouseEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/MouseEvent) whenever the mouse is clicked inside this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView). Gets invoked after [onMousePressed](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/onMousePressed) and [onMouseReleased](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/onMouseReleased).

info.signature: constructor(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number, height: Number, visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY, limitBounds: Boolean = true, target: T)

parameters.name: T
parameters.doc: The type of the [target](LayoutView). Must extend the [LayoutView](LayoutView) class.

parameters.name: posX
parameters.doc: The x-coordinate of the camera pane's position on the screen. Default is 0.

parameters.name: posY
parameters.doc: The y-coordinate of the camera pane's position on the screen. Default is 0.

parameters.name: width
parameters.doc: The width of the camera pane.

parameters.name: height
parameters.doc: The height of the camera pane.

parameters.name: visual
parameters.doc: The visual representation of the camera pane. Default is an empty visual.

parameters.name: target
parameters.doc: The target [LayoutView](LayoutView) that this camera pane will display.

parameters.name: limitBounds
parameters.doc: Whether the target layout view should be limited to the bounds of the camera pane. Default is true.

info.name: GridPane
info.signature: constructor(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, columns: Int, rows: Int, spacing: Number = DEFAULT_GRID_SPACING, layoutFromCenter: Boolean = true, visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY)
info.doc: Creates a [GridPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews) with given rows and columns.

parameters.name: spacing
parameters.doc: Spacing between rows and columns. Default: [DEFAULT_GRID_SPACING](tools.aqua.bgw.core/DEFAULT_GRID_SPACING).

parameters.name: layoutFromCenter
parameters.doc: Whether the [GridPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews) should anchor in the center (true) or top-Left (false). Default: true.

info.name: addColumns
info.doc: Adds the desired amount of columns between column columnIndex - 1 and columnIndex. New columns get null-initialized.

parameters.name: columnIndex
parameters.doc: Index on which the new column should be added

parameters.name: count
parameters.doc: Column count to be added. Default: 1

info.name: addRows
info.doc: Adds the desired amount of rows between row rowIndex and rowIndex + 1. New rows get null-initialized.

parameters.name: rowIndex
parameters.doc: Index after which the new row should be added

parameters.name: count
parameters.doc: Count of rows to be added. Default: 1

info.name: clear
info.doc: Clears the entire grid.

info.name: columns
info.doc: Current column count.

info.name: getCellCenterMode
info.signature: fun getCellCenterMode(columnIndex: Int, rowIndex: Int): Alignment
info.doc: Returns centering mode as an [Alignment](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Alignment) of the specified cell.

info.name: getColumnWidth
info.doc: Returns the set column width for the given column.

info.name: getRowHeight
info.doc: Returns the set row height for the given row.

info.name: get
info.signature: operator fun get(columnIndex: Int, rowIndex: Int): T?
info.doc: Returns [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in specified cell. Returns null if there was no component.

info.name: grow
info.signature: fun grow(left: Int = 0, right: Int = 0, top: Int = 0, bottom: Int = 0): Boolean
info.doc:
Grows grid by specified dimensions, filling new cells with null values.

New rows and columns get automatic resizing behavior, specified as [COLUMN_WIDTH_AUTO](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/GridPane/Companion/COLUMN_WIDTH_AUTO) and [ROW_HEIGHT_AUTO](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/GridPane/Companion/ROW_HEIGHT_AUTO). Therefore, new empty rows and columns get rendered with height and width 0.0 e.g. invisible if not specified otherwise.

parameters.name: left
parameters.doc: Column count to be added to the left.

parameters.name: right
parameters.doc: Column count to be added to the right.

parameters.name: top
parameters.doc: Row count to be added on the top.

parameters.name: bottom
parameters.doc: Row count to be added on the bottom.

throws.name: IllegalArgumentException
throws.doc: If any value passed was negative.

info.name: iterator
info.signature: open operator override fun iterator(): Iterator<GridIteratorElement<T>>
info.doc:
Returns an [Iterator](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin.collections/-iterator/index.html) over the grid components.

Iteration is columns-first which means that the iterator starts at cell 0,0 and then proceeds iterating through the first row from left to right. When reaching the end of a row it proceeds to the next one resetting the column pointer to 0.

[Iterator.hasNext](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin.collections/-iterator/has-next.html)://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin.collections/-iterator/index.html).hasNext Returns true if at least one cell is left to iterate.

[Iterator.next](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin.collections/-iterator/next.html)tps://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin.collections/-iterator/index.html).next Returns a data object [GridIteratorElement](tools.aqua.bgw.util/GridIteratorElement) that contains the current row and column as well as the component itself. Refer to the [GridIteratorElement](tools.aqua.bgw.util/GridIteratorElement) documentation for further information.

info.name: removeColumn
info.doc: Removes the desired column in the grid. Removes all, views in the column. If there is no column left in the grid, it gets trimmed to size 0x0.

parameters.name: columnIndex
parameters.doc: Index of the column to be deleted.

info.name: removeEmptyColumns
info.doc:
Removes all empty columns e.g. all rows that have no views in their cells.

That means after calling every column has at least one component in its cells.

Attribute columns get updated according to new dimension.

If the grid was empty the grid gets trimmed to size 0x0.

info.name: removeEmptyRows
info.doc:
Removes all empty rows e.g. all rows that have no views in their cells.

That means after calling every row has at least one component in its cells.

Attribute rows gets updated according to new dimension.

If the grid was empty the grid gets trimmed to size 0x0.

info.name: removeRow
info.doc:
Removes the desired row in the grid. Removes all, views in the row.

If there is no row left in the grid, it gets trimmed to size 0x0.

parameters.name: rowIndex
parameters.doc: Index of the row te be deleted.

info.name: rows
info.doc: Current row count.

info.doc: Restores automatic resizing behavior for desired column.

info.name: setAutoRowHeight
info.doc: Restores automatic resizing behavior for desired row.

info.name: setAutoRowHeights
info.doc: Restores automatic resizing behavior for all rows.

info.name: spacing
info.doc: Current spacing.

info.name: trim
info.doc:
Removes all empty outer rows and columns e.g. all rows and columns counted from left, right, top and bottom that have no views in their cells.

That means after calling the first and last row as well as the first and last column have at least one component in their cells.

Attributes rows and columns get updated according to new dimensions.

If the grid was empty the grid gets trimmed to size 0x0.

info.name: addAll
info.doc:
Adds all ComponentViews passed as varargs to this [Pane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/Pane).

Whenever a [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) is encountered, that is already contained, an [IllegalArgumentException](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin/-illegal-argument-exception/index.html) is thrown and no further [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) is added.

throws.name: IllegalArgumentException
throws.doc: If an [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) is already contained.

info.name: addAll

throws.name: IllegalArgumentException

info.name: ComboBox
info.signature: constructor(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_COMBOBOX_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_COMBOBOX_HEIGHT, font: Font = Font(), visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY, prompt: String = "", items: List<T> = emptyList(), formatFunction: (T) -> String? = null, disallowUnselect: Boolean = false, itemVisuals: List<Visual> = emptyList())
info.doc: Creates a [ComboBox](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents).

parameters.name: font
parameters.doc: [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) to be used for the options. Default: default [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) constructor.

parameters.name: visual
parameters.doc: [Visual](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/Visual) that is used to represent this [ComboBox](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: empty [Visual](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/Visual).

parameters.name: items
parameters.doc: The initial selection of items. Default: empty list.

parameters.name: formatFunction
parameters.doc: The formatFunction that is used to represent the items. Default: null.

parameters.name: disallowUnselect
parameters.doc: If true, the user is not allowed to unselect the currently selected item. By default, the first item is selected.

parameters.name: itemVisuals
parameters.doc: The [List](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin.collections/-list/index.html) of Visuals that are used to represent each item in the [ComboBox](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents) .

info.name: disallowUnselect
info.doc: If true, the user is not allowed to unselect the currently selected item. By default, the first item get selected instead of null.

info.name: formatFunction
info.doc:
The [formatFunction](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ComboBox/formatFunction) that gets used to obtain a [String](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin/-string/index.html) representation for each item.

If the value is null, the [toString](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin/-any/to-string.html) function of the item is used instead.

info.name: formatItem
info.doc: Manually trigger the formatFunction for a given item.

info.name: getSelectedIndex
info.doc: Get the index of the currently selected item.

info.name: ComboBox
info.signature: open class ComboBox<T>(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_COMBOBOX_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_COMBOBOX_HEIGHT, font: Font = Font(), visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY, val prompt: String = "", items: List<T> = emptyList(), formatFunction: (T) -> String? = null, val disallowUnselect: Boolean = false, itemVisuals: List<Visual> = emptyList()) : UIComponent
info.doc:
A standard [ComboBox](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ComboBox) that may be populated with items of specified type parameter.

The formatFunction is used to gain a String representation of each item. If no formatFunction is specified the [toString](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin/-any/to-string.html) function gets used instead.

Whenever the user selects an item, the [selectedItem](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ComboBox/selectedItem) gets updated.

parameters.doc: [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) to be used for the options. Default: default [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) constructor.

parameters.name: visual

parameters.name: items
parameters.doc: The initial selection of items. Default: empty list.

parameters.name: formatFunction
parameters.doc: The formatFunction that is used to represent the items. Default: null.

parameters.name: disallowUnselect
parameters.doc: If true, the user is not allowed to unselect the currently selected item. By default, the first item is selected.

parameters.name: itemVisuals

info.name: itemVisuals
info.doc:
[List](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin.collections/-list/index.html) of Visuals that are used to represent each item in the [ComboBox](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ComboBox).

The order of the visuals must match the order of the items. If no visual is specified for an item, the default visual of the [ComboBox](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ComboBox) is used.

info.name: selectedItem
info.doc:
The selected item.

May be null if no item is selected.

info.name: ListView
info.signature: constructor(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_LIST_VIEW_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_LIST_VIEW_HEIGHT, items: List<T> = emptyList(), font: Font = Font(), visual: Visual = ColorVisual.WHITE, orientation: Orientation = Orientation.VERTICAL, selectionMode: SelectionMode = SelectionMode.SINGLE, selectionBackground: ColorVisual = ColorVisual.BLUE, formatFunction: (T) -> String? = null)
info.doc: Creates a [ListView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents).

parameters.name: items
parameters.doc: Initial list of items for this [ListView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: empty list.

parameters.name: font
parameters.doc: [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) to be used for this [ListView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: default [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) constructor.

parameters.name: selectionMode
parameters.doc: Selection mode to be used for this [ListView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: [SelectionMode.SINGLE](SelectionMode/SINGLE).

parameters.name: selectionBackground
parameters.doc: Background for selected items in this [ListView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: [ColorVisual.BLUE](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/ColorVisual/Companion/BLUE).

parameters.name: formatFunction
parameters.doc: The formatFunction that is used to represent the items. Default: null.

info.name: formatFunction
info.doc:
The [formatFunction](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ListView/formatFunction) that gets used to obtain a [String](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin/-string/index.html) representation for each item.

If the value is null, the [toString](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin/-any/to-string.html) function of the item is used instead.

info.name: formatItem
info.doc: Manually trigger the formatFunction for a given item.

info.name: ListView
info.signature: open class ListView<T>(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_LIST_VIEW_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_LIST_VIEW_HEIGHT, items: List<T> = emptyList(), font: Font = Font(), visual: Visual = ColorVisual.WHITE, orientation: Orientation = Orientation.VERTICAL, selectionMode: SelectionMode = SelectionMode.SINGLE, selectionBackground: ColorVisual = ColorVisual.BLUE, formatFunction: (T) -> String? = null) : StructuredDataView<T>
info.doc:
A [ListView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ListView) displaying its items next to each other in the given orientation.

The formatFunction is used to gain a [String](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin/-string/index.html) representation of each item. If no formatFunction is specified the [toString](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin/-any/to-string.html) function gets used instead.

parameters.name: items
parameters.doc: Initial list of items for this [ListView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ListView). Default: empty list.

parameters.name: font
parameters.doc: [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) to be used for this [ListView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ListView). Default: default [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) constructor.

parameters.name: selectionMode
parameters.doc: Selection mode to be used for this [ListView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ListView). Default: [SelectionMode.SINGLE](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/SelectionMode/SINGLE).

parameters.name: selectionBackground
parameters.doc: Background for selected items in this [ListView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ListView). Default: [ColorVisual.BLUE](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/ColorVisual/Companion/BLUE).

parameters.name: formatFunction
parameters.doc: The formatFunction that is used to represent the items. Default: null.

info.name: PasswordField
info.signature: constructor(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_TEXT_FIELD_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_TEXT_FIELD_HEIGHT, text: String = "", prompt: String = "", font: Font = Font(), visual: Visual = ColorVisual(Color(240, 240, 240)))
info.doc: Creates a [PasswordField](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents).

parameters.name: text
parameters.doc: Initial text for this [PasswordField](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: empty String.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.doc: Prompt for this [PasswordField](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). This gets displayed as a prompt to the user whenever the label is an empty string. Default: empty string.

parameters.name: font
parameters.doc: [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) to be used to display text.

parameters.name: visual
parameters.doc: [Visual](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/Visual) to be used as a background. Defaults to a Light-gray [ColorVisual](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/ColorVisual).

info.name: PasswordField
info.signature: open class PasswordField(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_TEXT_FIELD_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_TEXT_FIELD_HEIGHT, text: String = "", prompt: String = "", font: Font = Font(), visual: Visual = ColorVisual(Color(240, 240, 240))) : TextInputUIComponent
info.doc:
A [PasswordField](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/PasswordField) is a single line input field that shows stars instead of typed text.

Whenever user input occurs the text field gets updated.

parameters.name: text
parameters.doc: Initial text for this [PasswordField](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/PasswordField). Default: empty String.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.doc: Prompt for this [PasswordField](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/PasswordField). This gets displayed as a prompt to the user whenever the label is an empty string. Default: empty string.

info.doc: Gets invoked whenever this [ProgressBar](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ProgressBar)'s bar progress changes.

info.name: progress
info.doc:
Progress state of this [ProgressBar](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ProgressBar).

Should be in range of 0 to 1.

A value between 0 and 1 represents the percentage of progress where 0 is 0% and 1 is 100% progress. Any value less than 0 gets represented as 0% progress, while any value greater than 1 gets represented as 100% progress.

info.name: RadioButton
info.signature: constructor(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_RADIO_BUTTON_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_RADIO_BUTTON_HEIGHT, text: String = "", font: Font = Font(), alignment: Alignment = Alignment.CENTER_LEFT, isSelected: Boolean = false, toggleGroup: ToggleGroup = ToggleGroup(), visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY)
info.doc: Creates a [RadioButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents).

parameters.name: text
parameters.doc: Text to be displayed for this [RadioButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents).

parameters.name: font
parameters.doc: [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) to be used to display text.

parameters.name: alignment
parameters.doc: Alignment to be used for this [RadioButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents).

parameters.name: isSelected
parameters.doc: The initial state for this [RadioButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: false.

parameters.name: toggleGroup
parameters.doc: The ToggleGroup of this [RadioButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: empty group.

info.name: RadioButton
info.signature: open class RadioButton(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_RADIO_BUTTON_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_RADIO_BUTTON_HEIGHT, text: String = "", font: Font = Font(), alignment: Alignment = Alignment.CENTER_LEFT, isSelected: Boolean = false, toggleGroup: ToggleGroup = ToggleGroup(), visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY) : BinaryStateButton
info.doc:
[RadioButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/RadioButton) is analogous to a [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleButton) with a different visual representation but cannot be deselected.

A [RadioButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/RadioButton) may be used as a [Button](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/Button) that is either selected or not selected. An important feature of RadioButtons is the [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup).

ToggleGroups can be used to group RadioButtons.

All RadioButtons that keep the same instance of a [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup) belong to that [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup). Only one [RadioButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/RadioButton) may be selected in a [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup). This means whenever a [RadioButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/RadioButton) changes its selected state to true, all other RadioButtons in the same [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup) get deselected.

An exception to this rule is, whenever a new [RadioButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/RadioButton) that is currently selected gets added to the [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup).

Note: Field isWrapText inherited from [BinaryStateButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/BinaryStateButton) has no effect on RadioButtons.

The first object in this [ObservableList](tools.aqua.bgw.observable.lists/ObservableList) will be the topmost row in the rendered [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent).

info.name: onSelectionChanged
info.doc: Gets invoked whenever items are selected or deselected.

info.name: selectAll
info.doc: Selects all items in this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent).

throws.name: IllegalStateException
throws.doc: If selection mode is not set to [SelectionMode.MULTIPLE](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/SelectionMode/MULTIPLE).

throws.name: IllegalArgumentException
throws.doc: If [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent) is empty.

info.name: selectFirst
info.doc: Selects the first element in this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent). Clears current selection.

throws.name: IllegalStateException
throws.doc: If selection mode is [SelectionMode.NONE](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/SelectionMode/NONE).

throws.name: IllegalArgumentException
throws.doc: If [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent) is empty.

info.name: selectIndex
info.doc: Selects the element at the specified index in this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent). Clears current selection.

throws.name: IllegalStateException
throws.doc: If selection mode is [SelectionMode.NONE](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/SelectionMode/NONE).

throws.name: IllegalArgumentException
throws.doc: If [index](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/StructuredDataView/selectIndex) is out of bounds.

info.name: selectLast
info.doc: Selects the last element in this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent). Clears current selection.

throws.name: IllegalStateException
throws.doc: If selection mode is [SelectionMode.NONE](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/SelectionMode/NONE).

throws.name: IllegalArgumentException
throws.doc: If [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent) is empty.

info.name: selectNext
info.doc:
Selects the next element in this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent). Clears current selection.

Selects first element if none is currently selected. If the last element is selected the selection does not change.

throws.name: IllegalStateException
throws.doc: If selection mode is not [SelectionMode.SINGLE](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/SelectionMode/SINGLE).

throws.name: IllegalArgumentException
throws.doc: If [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent) is empty.

info.name: selectPrevious
info.doc:
Selects the previous element in this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent). Clears current selection.

Selects last element if none is currently selected.

throws.name: IllegalStateException
throws.doc: If selection mode is not [SelectionMode.SINGLE](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/SelectionMode/SINGLE).

throws.name: IllegalArgumentException
throws.doc: If [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent) is empty.

info.name: select
info.doc: Selects the specified element. Clears current selection.

throws.name: IllegalStateException
throws.doc: If selection mode is [SelectionMode.NONE](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/SelectionMode/NONE).

throws.name: IllegalArgumentException
throws.doc: If [element](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/StructuredDataView/select) is not contained in items.

info.name: selectedIndices
info.doc: [ReadonlyObservableList](tools.aqua.bgw.observable.lists/ReadonlyObservableList) containing indices of all currently selected items in this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent). Register a listener to listen for selection changes. Item selection is enabled via selectionMode.

info.name: selectedItems
info.doc: [ReadonlyObservableList](tools.aqua.bgw.observable.lists/ReadonlyObservableList) containing all currently selected items in this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent). Register a listener to listen for selection changes. Item selection is enabled via selectionMode.

info.name: selectionBackground
info.doc: Background color for selected items in this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent). Item selection is enabled via selectionMode.

info.name: selectionMode
info.doc:
Selection mode to be used for this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent).

Changing from [SelectionMode.SINGLE](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/SelectionMode/SINGLE) to [SelectionMode.MULTIPLE](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/SelectionMode/MULTIPLE) keeps selection as is. Changing from [SelectionMode.MULTIPLE](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/SelectionMode/MULTIPLE) to [SelectionMode.SINGLE](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/SelectionMode/SINGLE) selects the item that was last selected. Changing from or to [SelectionMode.NONE](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/SelectionMode/NONE) clears selection.

Selected items and indices may be observed by registering observers on [selectedItems](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/StructuredDataView/selectedItems) and [selectedIndices](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/StructuredDataView/selectedIndices).

info.name: selectionStyle
info.doc:
Style of selected items in this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent). Item selection is enabled via selectionMode.

This gets applied last, so it may override any changes made via other fields and functions of the elements in this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent). Critical failures, bugs or other undefined behaviour could occur when using this feature.

deprecated.description: CSS Styling is no longer supported as of BGW 0.10.

info.name: TableColumn
info.signature: constructor(title: String, width: Number, font: Font = Font(), formatFunction: (T) -> String)
info.doc: Creates a [TableColumn](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents).

parameters.name: title
parameters.doc: The title for this [TableColumn](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). It gets displayed in the header row of the [TableView](TableView).

parameters.name: font
parameters.doc: [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) to be used for this [TableColumn](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: default [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) constructor.

parameters.name: formatFunction
parameters.doc: The format function for this [TableColumn](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). It gets applied to each item in the [TableView](TableView) to get a [String](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin/-string/index.html) for its cell.

info.name: font
info.doc: [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) of this [TableColumn](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/TableColumn).

info.name: formatFunction
info.doc:
The [formatFunction](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/TableColumn/formatFunction) that gets used to obtain a [String](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin/-string/index.html) representation for each item.

If the value is null, the [toString](https://kotlinlang.org/api/core/kotlin-stdlib/kotlin/-any/to-string.html) function of the item is used instead.

info.name: formatItem
info.doc: Manually trigger the formatFunction for a given item.

info.name: TableView
info.signature: constructor(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_TABLE_VIEW_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_TABLE_VIEW_HEIGHT, columns: List<TableColumn<T>> = emptyList(), items: List<T> = emptyList(), visual: Visual = ColorVisual.WHITE, selectionMode: SelectionMode = SelectionMode.SINGLE, selectionBackground: ColorVisual = ColorVisual.BLUE)
info.doc: Creates a [TableView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents).

parameters.name: columns
parameters.doc: Initial columns for this [TableView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: empty list.

parameters.name: items
parameters.doc: Initial list of items for this [TableView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: empty list.

parameters.name: selectionMode
parameters.doc: Selection mode to be used for this [TableView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: [SelectionMode.SINGLE](SelectionMode/SINGLE).

parameters.name: selectionBackground
parameters.doc: Background for selected items in this [TableView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: [ColorVisual.BLUE](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/ColorVisual/Companion/BLUE).

info.name: columns
info.doc: An [ObservableList](tools.aqua.bgw.observable.lists/ObservableList) that contains TableColumns which specify how the data is represented in that column. The first [TableColumn](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/TableColumn) in this [ObservableList](tools.aqua.bgw.observable.lists/ObservableList) will be the leftmost column in the rendered [TableView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/TableView).

info.name: TableView
info.signature: open class TableView<T>(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_TABLE_VIEW_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_TABLE_VIEW_HEIGHT, columns: List<TableColumn<T>> = emptyList(), items: List<T> = emptyList(), visual: Visual = ColorVisual.WHITE, selectionMode: SelectionMode = SelectionMode.SINGLE, selectionBackground: ColorVisual = ColorVisual.BLUE) : StructuredDataView<T>
info.doc:
A [TableView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/TableView) may be used to visualize a data table.

The items list is used as the data model. The columns list defines how the data is represented.

Note that the components [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) property will be ignored. Use the font field for each [TableColumn](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/TableColumn).

parameters.name: columns
parameters.doc: Initial columns for this [TableView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/TableView). Default: empty list.

parameters.name: items
parameters.doc: Initial list of items for this [TableView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/TableView). Default: empty list.

parameters.name: selectionMode
parameters.doc: Selection mode to be used for this [TableView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/TableView). Default: [SelectionMode.SINGLE](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/SelectionMode/SINGLE).

parameters.name: selectionBackground
parameters.doc: Background for selected items in this [TableView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/TableView). Default: [ColorVisual.BLUE](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/ColorVisual/Companion/BLUE).

constructors.signature: constructor(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_TABLE_VIEW_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_TABLE_VIEW_HEIGHT, columns: List<TableColumn<T>> = emptyList(), items: List<T> = emptyList(), visual: Visual = ColorVisual.WHITE, selectionMode: SelectionMode = SelectionMode.SINGLE, selectionBackground: ColorVisual = ColorVisual.BLUE)

parameters.name: selectionBackground
parameters.doc: Background for selected items in this [TableView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/TableView). Default: [ColorVisual.BLUE](tools.aqua.bgw.visual/ColorVisual/Companion/BLUE).

properties.name: actualHeight
properties.doc: The actual height for this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) considering scale.

properties.doc: Absolute horizontal position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in the [Scene](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Scene). Does not take panning and zooming of a [CameraPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/CameraPane) into account.

properties.name: actualPosY
properties.doc: Absolute vertical position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in the [Scene](tools.aqua.bgw.core/Scene). Does not take panning and zooming of a [CameraPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/CameraPane) into account.

properties.doc: The actual width for this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) considering scale.

properties.name: backgroundStyle
properties.doc: Css style that gets applied to this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent)'s background.

properties.name: columns
properties.doc: An [ObservableList](tools.aqua.bgw.observable.lists/ObservableList) that contains TableColumns which specify how the data is represented in that column. The first [TableColumn](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/TableColumn) in this [ObservableList](tools.aqua.bgw.observable.lists/ObservableList) will be the leftmost column in the rendered [TableView](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/TableView).

properties.name: componentStyle
properties.doc: Css style that gets applied to this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent).

properties.name: dropAcceptor
properties.doc: Returns whether this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) is a valid drop target for the dragged component in the given [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) or not.

properties.name: font
properties.doc: [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) of this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent). Usage depends on subclass.

properties.name: height
properties.doc: The [height](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/height) for this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: inParentPosX
properties.doc: Relative horizontal position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in its parent. Is equal to posX if the parent is not self-layouting like [CardStack](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/CardStack), [HexagonGrid](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/HexagonGrid), [LinearLayout](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/LinearLayout) or [GridPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/GridPane).

properties.name: inParentPosY
properties.doc: Relative vertical position of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) in its parent. Is equal to posY if the parent is self-layouting like [CardStack](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/CardStack), [HexagonGrid](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/HexagonGrid), [LinearLayout](tools.aqua.bgw.components.container/LinearLayout) or [GridPane](tools.aqua.bgw.components.layoutviews/GridPane).

properties.name: isDisabled
properties.doc: Controls if user input events cause input functions of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) to get invoked.

properties.name: isFocusable
properties.doc: Controls whether this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) is focusable or not.

properties.name: isLayoutFromCenter
properties.doc: Field that indicates whether posX and posY denote the center or top left of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView). Only relevant for GridPanes. Cannot be set manually.

properties.name: isVisible
properties.doc: Visibility of this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: items
properties.doc: An [ObservableList](tools.aqua.bgw.observable.lists/ObservableList) that contains the data objects. The first object in this [ObservableList](tools.aqua.bgw.observable.lists/ObservableList) will be the topmost row in the rendered [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent).

properties.name: layoutBounds
properties.doc: Returns a [CoordinatePlain](tools.aqua.bgw.util/CoordinatePlain) containing the component's corner Coordinates and its layout bounds.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: Name field only for debugging purposes. Has no effect on rendering.

properties.name: onDragDropped
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever a drag and drop gesture finishes over this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) and the [dropAcceptor](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/dropAcceptor) returns true for the given [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent).

properties.name: onDragGestureEntered
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever the mouse enters this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) while performing a drag gesture.

properties.name: onDragGestureExited
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [DragEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/DragEvent) whenever the mouse leaves this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) while performing a drag gesture.

properties.name: onKeyPressed
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [KeyEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/KeyEvent) whenever a key is pressed while this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) has focus.

properties.name: onKeyReleased
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [KeyEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/KeyEvent) whenever a key is released while this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) has focus.

properties.name: onKeyTyped
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [KeyEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/KeyEvent) whenever a Character is typed while this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView) has focus. Gets invoked after [onKeyPressed](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/onKeyPressed).

properties.name: onMouseClicked
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [MouseEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/MouseEvent) whenever the mouse is clicked inside this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView). Gets invoked after [onMousePressed](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/onMousePressed) and [onMouseReleased](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView/onMouseReleased).

properties.name: onMouseEntered
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [MouseEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/MouseEvent) whenever the mouse enters this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: onMouseExited
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [MouseEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/MouseEvent) whenever the mouse leaves this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: onMousePressed
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [MouseEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/MouseEvent) whenever the mouse is pressed inside this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: onMouseReleased
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [MouseEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/MouseEvent) whenever the mouse is released inside this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

properties.name: onMouseWheel
properties.doc: Gets invoked with a [WheelEvent](tools.aqua.bgw.event/WheelEvent) whenever the mouse wheel is turned while the mouse is inside this [ComponentView](tools.aqua.bgw.components/ComponentView).

info.name: isReadonly
info.doc:
Indicates whether this [TextInputUIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/TextInputUIComponent) is readonly.

If set to true, the user cannot change the text of this component. The prompt will be shown instead of the text if it is empty.

Programmatically, the text can still be changed.

info.name: ToggleButton
info.signature: constructor(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_TOGGLE_BUTTON_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_TOGGLE_BUTTON_HEIGHT, text: String = "", font: Font = Font(), alignment: Alignment = Alignment.CENTER_LEFT, isWrapText: Boolean = false, isSelected: Boolean = false, toggleGroup: ToggleGroup = ToggleGroup(), visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY)
info.doc: Creates a [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents).

parameters.name: text
parameters.doc: Text to be displayed for this [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents).

parameters.name: font
parameters.doc: [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) to be used for this [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: default [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) constructor.

parameters.doc: Alignment to be used for this [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents).

parameters.name: isWrapText
parameters.doc: Defines if text should be wrapped, if it exceeds the label's width. Default: false.

parameters.name: isSelected
parameters.doc: The initial state for this [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: false.

parameters.name: toggleGroup
parameters.doc: The ToggleGroup of this [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents). Default: empty group.

info.name: ToggleButton
info.signature: class ToggleButton(posX: Number = 0, posY: Number = 0, width: Number = DEFAULT_TOGGLE_BUTTON_WIDTH, height: Number = DEFAULT_TOGGLE_BUTTON_HEIGHT, text: String = "", font: Font = Font(), alignment: Alignment = Alignment.CENTER_LEFT, isWrapText: Boolean = false, isSelected: Boolean = false, toggleGroup: ToggleGroup = ToggleGroup(), visual: Visual = Visual.EMPTY) : BinaryStateButton
info.doc:
A [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleButton) may be used as a [Button](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/Button) that is either selected or not selected. An important feature of ToggleButtons is the [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup).

ToggleGroups can be used to group ToggleButtons.

All ToggleButtons that keep the same instance of a [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup) belong to that [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup). Only one [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleButton) may be selected in a [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup). This means whenever a [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleButton) changes its selected state to true, all other ToggleButtons in the same [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup) get deselected.

An exception to this rule is, whenever a new [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleButton) that is currently selected gets added to the [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup).

parameters.name: text
parameters.doc: Text to be displayed for this [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleButton).

parameters.name: font
parameters.doc: [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) to be used for this [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleButton). Default: default [Font](tools.aqua.bgw.util/Font) constructor.

parameters.name: alignment
parameters.doc: Alignment to be used for this [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleButton).

parameters.name: isWrapText
parameters.doc: Defines if text should be wrapped, if it exceeds the label's width. Default: false.

parameters.name: isSelected
parameters.doc: The initial state for this [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleButton). Default: false.

parameters.name: toggleGroup
parameters.doc: The ToggleGroup of this [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleButton). Default: empty group.

info.name: ToggleGroup
info.doc: Creates a [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup).

info.name: ToggleGroup
info.doc:
A [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup) may be set as an attribute in [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleButton) or [RadioButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/RadioButton).

All Buttons that keep the same instance of a [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup) belong to that [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup). Only one Button may be selected in a [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup). This means whenever a Button changes its selected state to true, all other Buttons in the same [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup) get deselected.

An exception to this rule is, whenever a new [ToggleButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleButton) or [RadioButton](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/RadioButton) that is currently selected gets added to the [ToggleGroup](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/ToggleGroup).

info.name: backgroundStyle
info.doc:
Css style that gets applied to this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent)'s background.

This gets applied last, so it may override any changes made via other fields and functions of this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent). Critical failures, bugs or other undefined behaviour could occur when using this feature.

deprecated.description: CSS Styling is no longer supported as of BGW 0.10.

This gets applied last, so it may override any changes made via other fields and functions of this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent). Critical failures, bugs or other undefined behaviour could occur when using this feature.

info.name: UIComponent
info.signature: abstract class UIComponent(posX: Number, posY: Number, width: Number, height: Number, font: Font, visual: Visual) : StaticComponentView<UIComponent>
info.doc: Baseclass for all UI components.

parameters.doc: Font for this [UIComponent](tools.aqua.bgw.components.uicomponents/UIComponent). Usage depends on subclass.
